name: comet-kvm
description: Codex plugin for GL.iNet Comet KVM operations, recovery, and BIOS/HWiNFO triage.

interface.shortDescription: Drive GL.iNet Comet KVM workflows from Codex
interface.longDescription: Operate physical hosts through a GL.iNet Comet or GLKVM-compatible device with screenshots, OCR, input, power, Wake-on-LAN, virtual media, appliance diagnostics, and specialized BIOS/HWiNFO workflows.
defaultPrompt: Inspect and recover a physical host through its Comet KVM
Mount rescue media and verify the target boots it
Inspect and verify one BIOS setting change
